title: genista lydia subsp. antiochia
intro: Genista lydia subsp. antiochia is a plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae) and is a subspecies of the Lydia broom (Genista lydia). It is a shrub native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, although further research is needed to confirm these claims. Genista lydia subsp. antiochia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its potential medicinal properties.
